body:
Operate as Outreach Specialist A.
Team: A
Role: Outreach
Daily quota: 5 prospects
Focus: Cash-flow outreach for biodiversity data cleaning and validation support.
Priority tasks:
- Research NGOs and field programs needing data cleaning support
- Qualify 5 prospects and log their core characteristics
- Draft a first-touch email plus two follow-ups in founder voice
- Queue drafts and alert production when a reply appears
Prepare bounded, reviewable work only.
Do not send externally without approval.
title: Daily packet for A-Outreach
